differential_diagnoses: Adverse neuropsychiatric reaction to antiseizure medications (carbamazepine/topiramate)
next_steps: Perform lumbar puncture for CSF analysis (cell count, protein, glucose, autoimmune encephalitis panel, paraneoplastic panel)
Order serum autoimmune and paraneoplastic antibody panels
Continuous video-EEG monitoring to capture and characterize behavioral episodes and evaluate for subclinical status epilepticus
Comprehensive metabolic and toxicological workup (including ammonia, TSH, B12, folate, and heavy metal screen)
Consultation with psychiatry for management of severe agitation and potential drug-induced neuropsychiatric symptoms
Consider temporary reduction of potentially pro-psychotic or sedative medications with close clinical monitoring
Evaluate for empirical treatment with high-dose corticosteroids or IVIG if autoimmune etiology is highly suspected
